message:
fix(doctor): critical bugs in post-repair write probe

Three bugs found during fresh-eyes review:

1. CRITICAL: priority was string 'medium' but column has CHECK(priority
   >= 0 AND priority <= 4) — the probe INSERT always failed the CHECK
   constraint, causing every doctor --repair to fall through to an
   unnecessary JSONL rebuild even on healthy databases. Fixed to
   integer 2.

2. Probe committed real data (INSERT + DELETE) which dirtied JSONL
   export state. Changed to ROLLBACK-only: insert, read-back, then
   rollback the entire transaction. No data is persisted.

3. Docstring for repair_via_vacuum incorrectly mentioned "out-of-order
   index entries" which are now classified as benign. Updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
